prompt: hey can you visualize the work calendar for 2027? like show me which months have more working days

assertions.name: PNG file exists
assertions.description: A PNG chart file was created

assertions.name: Valid PNG format
assertions.description: The file is a valid PNG image that can be opened

assertions.name: Shows 12 months
assertions.description: Chart displays all 12 months (January through December)

assertions.name: Mathematically correct workday counts
assertions.description: The workday counts match expected values for 2027 (e.g., Jan=21, Feb=20, Mar=23, etc.)

assertions.name: Values displayed on chart
assertions.description: Numerical values are visible on or near the bars
